name: Sapphire Tech B650M E Motherboard, Desktop PC Motherboard, for AMD Razor 9000/8000/7000 Series Processors, Wired Networking, AMD B650, AM5, 1x PCIE 5.0/1x PCIE 4.0, 1*HDMI, 1*DP
